name: Platform Policy Pack, Governance and Gatekeeper Rulebook

phase_boundary.scope: Policy, ADR, standard, checklist, service-architecture, service-contract, evidence, and Phase 5B input consolidation work only.
non_scope: Foundry runtime implementation
module installer implementation
business module implementation
runtime policy engine implementation
production auth/login implementation
scheduler runtime implementation
notification runtime implementation
reporting engine implementation
AI runtime implementation
marketplace implementation
external adapter implementation
deployment
secrets access
destructive migrations
Prisma/schema/migration changes
generated registry changes
package/dependency changes unless a specific governance artifact ticket explicitly approves exact-file scope

ticket_quality_rule: Implementation is not stale by itself; tickets become stale. Autonomous execution was not the root failure pattern. Stale, shallow, under-specified, overlapping, unsafe, or non-predictive tickets were the failure pattern. Every Phase 5A ticket must be fresh against current repo state, exact-file-plan-driven, scope-complete within Phase 5A policy/ADR/standard boundaries, dependency-aware, validation-backed, and strict enough to stop when work becomes Phase 5B runtime, Foundry/module installer, production auth, business modules, deployment, secrets, or destructive migration work. Target queue is 54 policy/ADR/standard tickets plus P5A-GATE, 55 total queue items. Current-user/profile surface is a Phase 5B auth/identity implementation surface, not a P5A-014 contract. P5A-015a specifies what the Golden Module must prove; the Phase 6 Module Certification Template is produced in Phase 6A, not Phase 5A.

tickets.title: Baseline controls, current-state inventory, roadmap housekeeping
tickets.objective: Establish the repo-grounded Phase 5A execution baseline and policy output inventory before any policy/ADR/standard ticket runs.
scope: Confirm Phase 5A starts from the current accepted Phase 4B main baseline.
Inventory strategic reference, planning basis, ticket pack, ADRs, standards, contracts, screen contracts, Prisma source of truth, generated registry, Phase 4B audit, and readiness handoff.
Update only explicitly approved stale roadmap/current-state references if exact-file planning confirms they are stale.
Record the policy output inventory and authority map that later tickets must follow.
non_scope: Do not implement Foundry runtime, module installer runtime, Gatekeeper runtime, business modules, production auth/login, scheduler runtime, notification runtime, reporting engine runtime, AI runtime, marketplace, external adapters, deployment, or secrets access.

Do not modify runtime app code, Prisma/schema/migrations, generated registry, package/dependency files, or runtime contracts unless a later explicit Phase 5A ticket grants exact-file governance-source approval.
Do not create Phase 5B ticket pack, Phase 5B implementation branch, Phase 6 Golden Module implementation, reusable Phase 6 certification template, or business-module work.
files_forbidden_to_change: docs/adr/ADR-0015-* unless this ticket explicitly owns ADR-0015
docs/adr/ADR-0016-* unless this ticket explicitly owns ADR-0016
docs/adr/ADR-0017-* unless this ticket explicitly owns ADR-0017
docs/adr/ADR-0018-* unless this ticket explicitly owns ADR-0018
required_outputs: Authority map showing source-of-truth hierarchy and Phase 5A output targets.
Stale roadmap/current-state housekeeping changes only if approved by exact-file plan.
Evidence that the strategic reference is the active Phase 5A queue source.
tests_required: Confirm P5A-000 creates or updates only its approved policy/ADR/standard/checklist/contract/handoff artifacts: PLANS.md, docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Master_Roadmap_Reference_v2.md, docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_Roadmap_v2.md, AGENTS.md.
Content scan confirms the output names owner, enforcement point, Phase 5B input, non-scope, stop conditions, and validation expectations.
Scope scan confirms no runtime app code, Prisma/schema/migration, generated registry, package/dependency, deployment, secret, Foundry runtime, module installer, or business-module files changed.
git diff --check passes and git status shows only approved files for the active ticket.
validation_commands: rg -n "P5A-000|Baseline controls, current-state inventory, roadmap housekeeping" PLANS.md docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Master_Roadmap_Reference_v2.md docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_Roadmap_v2.md AGENTS.md
stop_conditions: Exact-file plan reveals changes outside this ticket ownership area.
Any required output cannot name its owner, enforcement point, or Phase 5B implementation input.

Work would require Foundry/runtime/module installer implementation, business-module implementation, production auth, deployment, secrets, destructive migrations, package/dependency changes, Prisma/schema/migration changes, or generated registry changes.
Policy conflicts with Prisma, packages/contracts, module manifest schema, screen-contract schema, generated registry, accepted ADRs, or the strategic reference without a superseding ADR path.
Ticket becomes stale against current repo state or duplicates another Phase 5A ticket owner.
acceptance_criteria: Baseline controls, current-state inventory, roadmap housekeeping output exists at the approved path and is specific enough for Phase 5B to implement without guessing.
The output states owner, enforcement point, Gatekeeper implication where applicable, Phase 5B input, evidence requirements, validation expectations, non-scope, and stop conditions.
The output does not authorize runtime implementation or create unapproved schema/package/registry/code changes.
Ticket artifact summary, validation summary, and changed-files ZIP are created.
tickets.commit_message: docs: add P5A-000 baseline controls current state inventory roadmap housekeeping
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert only this ticket commit and its ticket artifact directory if validation fails. Do not revert earlier completed Phase 5A tickets without explicit approval.
tickets.conditional_replan_required: Re-plan if P5A-000 needs files outside its expected outputs, conflicts with an upstream ticket owner, or cannot produce a concrete Phase 5B enforcement/input artifact without runtime implementation.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Implementation is not stale by itself; stale tickets are the risk. Re-read the strategic reference and current repo sources before editing, and stop if assumptions no longer match current main.

Policy index / Gatekeeper checklist / Phase 5B input consolidation
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Baseline controls, current-state inventory, roadmap housekeeping must produce PLANS.md and docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Master_Roadmap_Reference_v2.md and docs/process/AKTI_ERP_Phase_Roadmap_v2.md and AGENTS.md with explicit owner, enforcement point, validation expectations, stop conditions, and Phase 5B implementation input; a vague document update is not sufficient.

requires_human_approval_if: A new ADR number or source-of-truth hierarchy change is needed beyond the ticket scope.
